# Hockey Dataset Analysis Questions 🚀

1. Find the team with maximum wins.

2. Find the team with minimum losses.

3. Find all teams having wins greater than 40.

4. Find all teams having losses less than 20.**

5. Find average wins of all teams.

6. Find average losses of all teams.

7. Find top 10 teams with highest wins.

8. Find bottom 10 teams with lowest wins.

9. Sort teams by wins in descending order.

10. Sort teams by losses in ascending order.**

11. Find all teams from year 2011.

12. Find all teams between years 2005 and 2010.

13. Count total unique teams.

14. Find how many records each year contains.

15. Find which year has highest average wins.

16. Find which year has lowest average losses.

17. Create a new column:

```python id="m4u8tp"
Win_Difference = Wins - Losses
```

18. Find team with highest win difference.

19. Find team with lowest win difference.

20. Find correlation between wins and losses.

21. Plot bar chart of top 10 teams by wins.

22. Plot histogram of wins.

23. Plot histogram of losses.

24. Plot line graph of yearly average wins.

25. Plot scatter graph of wins vs losses.

26. Find teams whose wins are above average.

27. Find teams whose losses are below average.

28. Find median wins.

29. Find mode of wins.

30. Find standard deviation of wins.

31. Find all teams with exactly 50 wins.

32. Find all years where average wins exceeded 35.

33. Find duplicate team names if any.

34. Find the oldest year in dataset.

35. Find the latest year in dataset.

36. Find total wins of all teams combined.

37. Find total losses of all teams combined.

38. Find percentage of teams having wins above 30.

39. Save filtered top teams into another CSV file.
